mapper.select: SELECT ab.ASGMT_SN, ab.CLASS_SN, ab.RGTR_USER_ID, ab.ASGMT_SJ, ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT, ab.ASGMT_STAT_CD, ab.REG_DT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s WHERE s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN) AS SBMT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s WHERE s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN AND s.GRDD_YN = 'Y') AS GRDD_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = ab.CLASS_SN AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY ab.REG_DT DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE CLASS_SN = #{classSn}

SELECT ab.ASGMT_SN, ab.CLASS_SN, ab.RGTR_USER_ID, ab.ASGMT_SJ, ab.ASGMT_CN, ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT, ab.ASGMT_STAT_CD, ab.LAST_MDFR_ID, ab.REG_DT, ab.RESBMT_ALLD_YN, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s WHERE s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN) AS SBMT_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CLASSROOM_MEMBER cm WHERE cm.CLASS_SN = ab.CLASS_SN AND cm.ENRL_STAT_CD = 'ENROLLED') AS TOT_MEMBER_CNT FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab WHERE ab.ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD WHERE ASGMT_SN = #{asgmtSn} AND CLASS_SN = #{classSn}
mapper.select: SELECT ab.ASGMT_SN AS asgmtSn, ab.ASGMT_SJ AS asgmtSj, TO_CHAR(ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS sbmtDdlnDt, CASE WHEN s.SBMT_SN IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sbmtYn, NVL(s.GRDD_YN, 'N') AS grddYn, s.SCORE AS score FROM ASSIGNMENT_BOARD ab LEFT JOIN ASSIGNMENT_SUBMIT s ON s.ASGMT_SN = ab.ASGMT_SN AND s.SBMT_USER_ID = #{userId} WHERE ab.CLASS_SN = #{classSn} ORDER BY ab.SBMT_DDLN_DT ASC
